arts.ttl: PL Predictions: Brighton to make top four move at Man City
arts.sum: Our betting expert Jones Knows provides his insight and best bets for the Premier League fixtures and makes a case for Brighton to win at Man City.

arts.ttl: Surprise Real Madrid player joins Mbappé and Haaland among Champions League’s fastest
arts.sum: Asencio’s sprint reached 22.2 mph (35.8 km/h), making it the fastest by a center-back in the Champions League this season and the eighth fastest of any player overall. Who are the fastest players in the 2024/25 Champions League?

arts.ttl: Barcelona and Real Madrid derail Man Utd transfer hopes for ex-Man City star
arts.sum: Barcelona and Real Madrid could emerge as frontrunners to sign Jeremie Frimpong this summer after reports that the Bayer Leverkusen defender could be the subject of a tug-of-war by the Spanish giants. Real are expecting to sign Trent Alexander-Arnold on a free transfer as their ideal right-back choice but they could turn to Frimpong if the England international renews his contract with Liverpool, with his current deal set to expire this summer.

arts.ttl: Manchester City owners City Football Group see cumulative losses reach almost £1bn
arts.sum: City Football Group was founded in 2013 and Manchester City contribute 77% of its annual revenue

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Brighton: Pep Guardiola's side must score 'minimum of two goals' as out-of-form star is tipped to be dropped
arts.sum: Man City must score 'a minimum of two goals' if they wish to beat Brighton & Hove Albion in the Premier League on Saturday, Citizens expert steven McInerney tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Brighton: Erling Haaland bidding to become a centurion and set new Premier League record
arts.sum: Erling Haaland will attempt to set a fresh Premier League record when Manchester City welcome Brighton & Hove Albion to the Etihad Stadium on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Man City lineup vs. Brighton: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Manchester City could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Brighton & Hove Albion.

arts.ttl: Brighton lineup vs. Man City: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Brighton & Hove Albion could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Preview: Manchester City vs. Brighton & Hove Albion - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Premier League clash between Manchester City and Brighton & Hove Albion, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Kalvin Phillips: Man City asking price 'revealed' as 'verbal agreement' is reached to re-join Leeds this summer
arts.sum: Championship title hopefuls Leeds United are reportedly 'very much on course' to bring Kalvin Phillips back to Elland Road in the summer transfer window.
